ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "primary_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary physician assigned to the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "med_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was discontinued */,
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prescription */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescription_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescription_id") REFERENCES prescriptions ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "proc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient on whom the procedure was performed */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the procedure */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date the procedure was performed */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who performed the procedure */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the procedure was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procedure (e.g., completed, scheduled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the procedure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the procedure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the procedure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient reporting the symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom was first reported */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the symptom (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the symptom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physicians" (
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physician */,
  "physician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the physician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the physician */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the physician belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the physician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the physician */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the physician (e.g., MD, DO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the physician record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the physician record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hospital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hospital record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hospital record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the prescription was written */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who wrote the prescription */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the prescription was written */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prescription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the prescription */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prescription record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prescription record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the test was performed */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lab result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lab result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who visited */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who provided care */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., follow-up, initial consultation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the allergy */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Substance the patient is allergic to */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction to the allergen */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the reaction (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the allergy (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the allergy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the allergy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the allergy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "dose" INTEGER /* Dose number */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next dose is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vaccination (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the vaccination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vaccination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vaccination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., physician, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
